channel.title: Frontend on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Frontend on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer

item.title: Ape Unit — Blockchain Explorer & Team Building in Berlin
item.description: Led development of a blockchain explorer for the Aeternity network and managed a new tech team of four developers across India and Berlin.

item.title: TransformNow — A PWA for Healthy Living
item.description: Designed and developed a Progressive Web App with 30+ pages scoring 90+ on Lighthouse for performance, accessibility, and SEO.

item.title: Faculty360 — Faculty Recruitment Platform
item.description: Developed the frontend for a faculty recruitment and management platform for educational institutions.
